name: X-Golf Rapid City
address: 2200 N Maple Ave Unit 458, Rapid City, SD 57701
about: X-Golf Rapid City is an indoor golf facility utilizing top-tier technology to provide a year-round golfing experience. The venue features 9,000 square feet of space with personalized lockers, a full food and bar menu, and golf lessons from PGA professionals. It offers a country club experience at a fraction of the price, with options for individuals and corporate memberships. The facility is equipped with state-of-the-art golf simulators that allow players to practice or play on world-class courses regardless of weather conditions.
why_golfers_like_it: Highest technology golf simulators in the world for an authentic experience
Full food and bar menu with a wide selection of self-poured beer
PGA professional instructors available for lessons
Year-round access to world's best courses
Competitive X-League with handicapped play and prize money up to $10,000

food_and_drink.notes: Full food and bar menu available.

simulator_hardware.notes: Custom-built simulators using laser, light, impact, and camera sensory technologies

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own clubs to use the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink are not allowed, but the facility offers a full food and bar menu with a wide selection of self-poured beer.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes varies depending on the number of players in your group and your pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, X-Golf Rapid City is a family-friendly venue where you can enjoy watching and playing the sport you love with your family and friends.
